mapper.insert: insert into sysuser (username, password, nickname) values (#{username},#{password},#{nickname})
mapper.update: update sysuser set username = null, password = null, nickname = null, avatar = null, balance = 0 where id = #{id}
mapper.select:
select * from sysuser
and nickname like concat('%',#{nickname},'%')
and role = 'user'
select count(*) from sysuser where role = 'user'
